heading: Sense of Congress regarding need for improved and better coordinated Federal policy for brown tree snake introduction, control, and eradication
label: 8502 Sense of Congress regarding need for improved and better coordinated Federal policy for brown tree snake introduction, control, and eradication
text: It is the sense of Congress that there exists a need for improved and better coordinated control, interdiction, research, and eradication of the brown tree snake on the part of the United States and other interested parties.
